summary: Completed frontend testing of light/dark mode UI across Admin Console and booking items/invoice functionality. All reported issues appear to be FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: Light mode styling in AdminOutlets.js is correct - uses proper light/dark color classes
AdminSlotBooking.js duplicate dark: classes have been fixed
InvoiceModal correctly includes booking.items array in totals calculation
Hover states work correctly in both light and dark modes using hover:bg-[#5FA8D3]/10 and dark:hover:bg-[#5FA8D3]/15
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - booking C5D30998 has inventory items attached
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light/dark mode theming is working correctly across all Admin Console pages. Invoice modal correctly shows service + inventory items with proper totals.

light_mode_admin_console.details: All Admin Console pages (Staff Management, Outlets, Slot Booking) display correctly in light mode with good text contrast

dark_mode_admin_console.details: All Admin Console pages display correctly in dark mode

light_mode_bookings_page.details: Bookings table and upcoming bookings cards display correctly in light mode

dark_mode_bookings_page.details: Bookings table and upcoming bookings cards display correctly in dark mode

hover_states_light_mode.details: Table row hover highlights work correctly in light mode

hover_states_dark_mode.details: Table row hover highlights work correctly in dark mode

inventory_items_in_invoice.details: Invoice modal correctly displays service + inventory items. Tested with booking C5D30998 which shows Premium Wash 7 (₹399) + 5 products (₹1,295) = ₹1,694 total before tax

add_products_to_booking_modal.details: Add Products to Booking modal opens correctly and displays inventory items with prices and stock levels

invoice_totals_calculation.details: Invoice correctly calculates: Service + Products subtotal + GST (18%) = Total

theme_toggle.details: Light/Dark mode toggle in sidebar works correctly and persists theme across navigation

ui_verification.contrast_issues: None found - all text is readable in both modes
ui_verification.styling_issues: None found - CSS classes are properly applied

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB database
